proved: real child-process stdio initialization and tool discovery
tool input and output JSON Schema generation
Streamable HTTP protocol header/body mismatch rejection

unsupported_assumptions: SDK support for newer protocol revisions does not authorize negotiating newer than 2025-11-25
SDK transport sessions are not Starclock AgentSession identity, ownership, expiry, idempotency, quota, authorization, or tenancy
cancellation is advisory and must not interrupt or roll back an authoritative commit after mutation begins
Streamable HTTP construction does not by itself satisfy Starclock origin, authorization, scope, tenant, TLS, rate-limit, or audit policy

tasks, prompts, completions, sampling, elicitation, logging, subscriptions, and resource list-changed notifications are outside the Goal 02 public surface unless a later revision explicitly freezes them
MCP content text is convenience output; structuredContent and the protocol-neutral schema remain authoritative
the SDK does not replace application-level payload, event, settlement, replay, or session bounds
